EXPEDITION_TRACKER.Title: Expedition Tracker
EXPEDITION_TRACKER.NoWanderingCheckRecorded: No wandering monster check recorded yet.

Expedition.StartConfirmBody: Start a new expedition and clear the current turn count and expedition log?
Expedition.EndConfirmBody: End the current expedition and collapse the tracker?

Notes.Title: Note Current Turn
Notes.Label: Turn notes
Notes.Placeholder: Add details for the current turn...
Notes.Unavailable: Record at least one turn before adding a note.

OtherTurn.Title: Other Expedition Turn
OtherTurn.Empty: Enter a turn activity before continuing.

TimedEffects.NoTemplatesConfigured: No timed effect templates are configured. Add one in module settings first.
TimedEffects.TemplateValidation: Each timed effect template requires both a name and an icon path.

AddDialog.Title: Add Timed Effect
AddDialog.SourcePlaceholder: Choose a scene actor or type a custom source...
AddDialog.SourceTokenPlaceholder: Select a token on the current scene
AddDialog.SourceLabelOverridePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the token name
AddDialog.SourceTokenRequired: Select a token on the current scene for light source effects.

ManageDialog.Title: Manage {name}
ManageDialog.DisplayLabelPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the token name

RemoveDialog.Title: Remove Timed Effect
RemoveDialog.Body: Remove {name} from the timed effects track?
RemoveDialog.LightSourceBody: Remove {name} from the timed effects track. Should the linked token light be recalculated too?

Settings.MenuHint: Configure the effect templates that can be added to the timed effects turn track.
Settings.FormHint: Define reusable timed effect templates with a name, icon path, and optional default duration.

Journal.Name: Expedition Log
Journal.LogHint: Create or use the Expedition Log journal and add this expedition as a new page.
Journal.NameRequired: Enter an expedition name to log this expedition to the journal.
Journal.Unavailable: Unable to create or update the Expedition Log journal.

Time.CustomRequired: Complete all custom time procedure fields before continuing.

Wandering.AutoCheckHint: If enabled, the tracker rolls wandering checks automatically after every matching turn interval. The manual button still remains available.
Wandering.SettingsHint: These settings are stored with this expedition and used by the Wandering Check button.

Enable.Name: Enable Expedition Tracker
Enable.Hint: If enabled, the GM can use the expedition tracker above the hotbar for turn tracking and expedition journaling.

TimedEffectsEnable.Name: Enable Timed Effects Turn Track
TimedEffectsEnable.Hint: If enabled, the expedition tracker shows the timed effects turn track and allows GMs to add countdown effects.

TrackerPosition.ResetMenuHint: Reset the expedition tracker HUD back to its default position above the hotbar for your client.
TrackerPosition.ResetDescription: Reset the expedition tracker HUD to its default position above the hotbar.
